data.title: Bitfinex records 2-year high in Bitcoin longs; Possible $100K rally ahead amidst market uncertainty.
data.description: The number of Bitcoin margin long positions on Bitfinex exchange has surged to its highest level in two years, just before a significant drop in both stock and cryptocurrency prices. Traders are now uncertain whether to anticipate a market rally or if the ongoing correction will persist.

data.title: Richtech Robotics closes $38.7M private placement for 8.5M shares of Class B stock under Nasdaq rules.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Richtech Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: RR), a company from Nevada specializing in AI-driven service robots, revealed the completion of a private placement deal. This transaction involved the acquisition and trading of 8,500,000 shares of the Company’s Class B common stock at a price determined by Nasdaq rules.

data.title: Altimmune closed a $75 million direct offering with a new investor for 17,045,454 shares of common stock or pre-funded warrants, to develop pemvidutide for liver diseases.
data.description: Gaithersburg, Maryland, January 29, 2026 - Altimmune, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALT), a biopharmaceutical company at a late clinical stage, has concluded its previously announced registered direct offering with a new institutional investor, selling 17,045,454 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants in lieu of stock) for gross proceeds of around $75 million. Altimmune offered all the shares and pre-funded warrants in this public offering. The pre-funded warrants, exercisable at $0.001 per share upon issuance, have no expiration until fully exercised. This development aims to aid in the development of pemvidutide for treating severe liver conditions.

data.title: CVR Energy prices private placement of $600M 7.500% Senior Notes Due 2031 and $400M 7.875% Senior Notes Due 2034.
data.description: CVR Energy, Inc. disclosed that it priced a private placement offering under Rule 144A and Regulation S of the Securities Act of 1933. The offering includes $600 million in total of 7.500% senior unsecured notes maturing in 2031 (referred to as "2031 Notes") and $400 million in total of 7.875% senior unsecured notes maturing in 2034 (referred to as "2034 Notes"). This news comes from Sugar Land, Texas, and involves the company listed as CVR Energy on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CVI.

data.title: Primavera Online School receives a B grade from Arizona State Board of Education for 2024-25 after improved academic performance.
data.description: In Phoenix, Primavera Online School has received a B letter grade (considered highly performing) for the 2024-2025 school year, as announced today. The Arizona State Board of Education (SBE) finalized this grade during their public meeting on January 26, 2026, after a thorough assessment of academic performance data. This evaluation took into account updated accountability calculations and a comprehensive analysis of student performance outcomes.

data.title: ThinkNow releases study on perception of Bad Bunny's halftime show. Surveyed 1,500 US adults. Discusses awareness, culture, and brand implications.
data.description: In Burbank, California, on January 29, 2026, ThinkNow, a research firm specializing in multicultural consumer insights, published results from a survey of 1,500 American adults. The survey aimed to analyze the awareness, cultural significance, and brand impact of Bad Bunny's halftime show.
Nagambie Resources in talks for investment and earn-in; proposed sum undisclosed.

data.title: Poetiq raises $45.8M for AI system, surpasses LLMs on benchmark. Founded by ex-Google DeepMind scientists.
data.description: A California-based company, Poetiq, recently emerged from stealth mode after achieving a new state-of-the-art result on the ARC-AGI-2 platform. Established by ex-Google DeepMind researchers, the company revealed its development of an AI meta-system optimizing Large Language Models. The announcement was made on January 29, 2026. Additionally, Poetiq disclosed its successful fundraising efforts, although the specific amount was not mentioned.

data.title: Foothill Gold Line Board maintains leadership in 2026 with Ed Reece as Chair for fourth year and Mendell Thompson as Vice Chair for third year.
data.description: The Board Chair position has been retained by Claremont Vice Mayor Ed Reece for the fourth consecutive year, with Glendora Council Member Mendell Thompson serving as Board Vice Chair for the third year. This decision was announced during the January meeting in MONROVIA, Calif. on January 29, 2026.

data.title: Sprott Physical Copper Trust to list on NYSE Arca, approved by SEC for dual-listing alongside TSX, expanding reach.
data.description: Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., revealed that the Sprott Physical Copper Trust, dedicated to investing in physical copper metal, received approval from the US Securities and Exchange Commission. This approval allows NYSE Arca to list and trade the Trust's units, enabling a dual-listing on both TSX and NYSE Arca. The Trust, under tickers COP.UN and COP.U, will see its Units traded on these platforms following SEC's Rule 19b-4 application approval.

data.title: Chronic Hepatitis D market to grow from 2025-2034 with promising therapies like Brelovitug and Tobevibart + Elebsiran.
data.description: The market for chronic hepatitis D virus is projected to have a consistent growth due to a limited amount of upcoming treatments in the pipeline. Key contenders, like Brelovitug by Bluejay Therapeutics and the Tobevibart + Elebsiran duo by Vir Biotechnology, point towards the sector's potential. These therapies are crucial in addressing the needs of a significant number of patients affected by the disease.

data.title: TNAG Global buys Norman’s Rare Guitars to preserve legacy, expand. Los Angeles-based. #cartervintageguitars.
data.description: In a recent announcement, TNAG Global, the family-owned company known for Nashville’s Carter Vintage Guitars, has confirmed the acquisition of Norman’s Rare Guitars located in Los Angeles. This strategic move marks a significant development in the musical instrument industry as TNAG Global expands its footprint. The acquisition brings together two iconic establishments, solidifying TNAG Global's position in the market. The deal includes the purchase of Norman’s Rare Guitars' entire inventory and assets. Both parties are enthusiastic about this merger, which combines the rich history and expertise of these renowned guitar destinations.

data.title: Vivian Health Co-founder Parth Bhakta becomes Executive Chairman as Bill Kong appointed CEO for AI-driven growth.
data.description: Following the acquisition by IAC, Vivian Health, under the leadership of Co-founder and CEO Parth Bhakta, has achieved profitability and an impressive 50x revenue growth. Transitioning to the role of Executive Chairman, Bhakta appoints Bill Kong as the new CEO. Kong will spearhead Vivian's future growth centered around AI technology. This change in leadership marks a significant moment for the company, as it looks towards expanding and scaling further.
